initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON ra.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael'
  AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
  AND c.name = 'Sepang International Circuit'
  AND r.position = '1';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON ra.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael'

  AND c.name = 'Sepang International Circuit'
  AND r.position = '1';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results 
JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId 
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId 
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId 
WHERE drivers.forename = 'Michael' 
  AND drivers.surname = 'Schumacher' 
  AND circuits.name = 'Sepang International Circuit' 
  AND results.position = 1;
